name: tier-c/haskell/02-stack-yaml-positive
description: Positive case: stack.yaml YAML packages array per §1.14; two .cabal-bearing subdirs.

manifests.pkgA/pkgA.cabal:
cabal-version: 2.4
name: pkgA
version: 0.1.0.0
library
  exposed-modules: PkgA
manifests.pkgB/pkgB.cabal:
cabal-version: 2.4
name: pkgB
version: 0.1.0.0
library
  exposed-modules: PkgB
